programs.name: Treat Biosciences
programs.description: Two-peptide canine therapeutics platform: TRT-001 (triple incretin) + TRT-002 (engineered follistatin). Co-founded with Frank Gillam (CEO) and Niki Cyrus (CFO). David is CSO.

projects.name: TRT-002 In Silico Design Pipeline
projects.charter: Charter 505: Engineered follistatin fragment (ND-FSD1-FSD2) as myostatin/activin antagonist for canine muscle preservation. Phase 1 (binding interface mapping) and Phase 2 (design report) COMPLETE. In silico binding validation COMPLETE. Two parallel tracks: Track 1 (7 deconstructed follistatin variants scored via PRODIGY) and Track 2 (de novo binder design via RFdiffusion). Gene synthesis spec ready for GenScript order (~$400).

tasks.description: Phase 1: Binding Interface Mapping (46 contacts, 29 H-bonds, 3 salt bridges)
Phase 2: Complete Design Report v2.1 (120KB, 1,909 lines)
D11: In silico binding validation (PRODIGY) — all 3 constructs + crystal control
Track 1: Score 7 deconstructed follistatin variants (ESMFold + PRODIGY)
AlphaFold2 Multimer complex prediction
tasks.blocker: Running on Colab T4 GPU now — ColabFold API was down, now executing

tasks.description: Track 2: RFdiffusion de novo binder design
tasks.blocker: Colab notebook ready, needs GPU execution after AF2M completes

tasks.description: Place GenScript gene synthesis order (~$400)
D10: Gene synthesis order spec finalized (pET-32a, SHuffle T7)
Update lead sequence from V1 to V7 robust (N82Q+R140Q+R169Q)

projects.name: Triple Incretin Program (TRT-001)
projects.charter: Charter 501: Canine-optimized triple incretin agonist modeled on retatrutide scaffold (GLP-1/GIP/glucagon). Structural analysis shows 80-90%+ probability unmodified retatrutide works in dogs. GLP-1R 93.1% conserved, GIPR 100%, GCGR 100% at binding contacts.

tasks.description: Structural comparison: canine vs human incretin receptors (corrected)
Lilly retatrutide patent landscape analysis
tasks.blocker: David's ChatGPT deep search pending — does Lilly patent cover veterinary?

tasks.description: IP strategy: conservative AA substitution at non-contact positions

projects.name: Investor Pitch Deck
projects.charter: Google Slides pitch deck for seed fundraising. 10 slides. Slide 8 (Roadmap) redesigned with 5 stages. Slide 10 (The Ask) rebuilt with SAFE terms. Full audit completed. Tony verbal commit ~$167K (1/3 of $500K).

tasks.description: Rework pitch deck for new two-peptide platform thesis

tasks.description: Fix Slides 2, 5, 9 per audit
Post-Tony fundraising: find 2-3 investors for remaining ~$333K

projects.name: Regulatory Strategy
projects.charter: CNADA under ADAA 1996 is the correct regulatory path. MUMS does NOT qualify (675× over 80K threshold). Composition-of-matter patent (20 years) > MUMS exclusivity (7 years).

tasks.description: CNADA vs NADA pathway analysis
MUMS Act analysis (definitively does NOT qualify)

projects.name: Development Cost Analysis
projects.charter: Bottom-up cost analysis. Conditional launch: $6.5-12.5M. Full NADA: $12-25M. Staged fundraising model adopted. David's deep review found original estimates low by 3-5×.

tasks.description: Development cost analysis v3 (audit-corrected)

projects.name: Treat Documents Portal
projects.charter: 52 HTML charter documents deployed at neuralnexus.press/treat-docs/ (password-protected). Includes discovery program, in vitro, preclinical, canine study, MUMS analysis, structural reports, design reports.
